name: stripe-session-vs-payment-intent
hook: Stripe Checkout Session ID (cs_...) != PaymentIntent ID (pi_...)
body: Stripe Checkout Session IDs (cs_...) and PaymentIntent IDs (pi_...) are distinct. Session IDs are for Checkout API; PaymentIntent IDs are for Refunds API and charge.refunded webhooks. Always store both when processing Stripe payments.
why: Bug #1986: providerTransactionId was storing cs_... but stripe.refunds.create requires pi_... — this broke all Stripe refunds.

name: payment-status-gate-entitlements
hook: Gate entitlement grant on payment_status=paid not checkout.session.completed
body: For async payment methods (Klarna, ACH, SEPA), checkout.session.completed fires BEFORE payment actually clears. Entitlements must only be granted when payment_status === 'paid'. Use checkout.session.async_payment_succeeded/failed for async payment flows.
why: Bug #1986: entitlements were leaked for unpaid async payments because the webhook granted on session.completed regardless of payment_status.
